_comment: Template for a new company. Copy this file, fill in real filing data, drop the filename into run_forecast.py's load_drivers() call. No code changes needed — forecast_engine.py and commentary_generator.py read every value from this schema generically.
source_file: path to the extracted financial data markdown

quarterly_revenue.note: List whatever quarters you actually pulled. Missing quarters are fine — just don't fabricate them. Add a note here if the trailing window is short.

revenue_growth_rate.citation: where this came from in the filing

known_gaps: List anything you couldn't confirm or pull — missing quarters, undecomposed guidance items, etc. This feeds directly into the commentary's OPEN ITEMS section. Don't leave this empty just to look clean.
